technique_summary: Excellent extracorporeal knot tying technique demonstrated with expert-level timing. However, video does not show the complete task including suture placement through marked Penrose drain.
strengths: Efficient timing at 48 seconds (well within expert range)
improvement_suggestions: Cannot provide specific suggestions as complete task sequence not visible
